name: Patchright Integration
details: Plan to integrate Patchright as a drop-in replacement for Playwright in dev-browser. Patchright is a patched, undetected version of Playwright that bypasses bot detection systems.

tasks.name: Research
tasks.details: Gather information about Patchright and assess compatibility with dev-browser

sub_tasks.name: Codebase analysis
sub_tasks.details:
Analyze dev-browser source to understand Playwright API usage:
- src/index.ts: chromium.launchPersistentContext, context.newCDPSession, page.on('close'), etc.
- src/client.ts: chromium.connectOverCDP, browser.contexts(), page.evaluate, etc.

sub_tasks.name: Patchright research
sub_tasks.details:
Research Patchright npm package:
- Drop-in replacement for Playwright (just change import)
- Only patches CHROMIUM (Firefox/Webkit not supported) - perfect for dev-browser
- Version 1.57.0 current
- Key patches: Runtime.enable leak fix, Console.enable disabled, tweaked command flags
- Passes: Cloudflare, Datadome, Fingerprint.com, etc.

tasks.name: Implementation
tasks.details: Replace Playwright with Patchright in the codebase

sub_tasks.name: Update package.json
sub_tasks.details:
Replace playwright dependency with patchright:
- Remove: "playwright": "^1.49.0"
- Add: "patchright": "^1.57.0"

sub_tasks.name: Update src/index.ts
sub_tasks.details:
Change import from 'playwright' to 'patchright':
- Line 2: import { chromium, ... } from "patchright"
- Consider adding channel: "chrome" option for best undetection
- Consider adding viewport: null for best undetection

sub_tasks.name: Update src/client.ts
sub_tasks.details:
Change import from 'playwright' to 'patchright':
- Line 1: import { chromium, ... } from "patchright"

sub_tasks.name: Install dependencies
sub_tasks.details:
Run bun install and install patchright chromium driver:
- bun install
- bunx patchright install chromium

sub_tasks.name: TypeScript check
sub_tasks.details: Run bun x tsc --noEmit to ensure no type errors

sub_tasks.name: Unit tests
sub_tasks.details: Run bun run test to ensure all tests pass

sub_tasks.name: Manual testing
sub_tasks.details: TypeScript check and all 9 unit tests pass. Server script updated to use Patchright Chrome installation.

tasks.name: Documentation
tasks.details: Update docs to reflect Patchright usage

sub_tasks.name: Update CLAUDE.md
sub_tasks.details: Add note about Patchright and its anti-detection features

sub_tasks.name: Update README.md
sub_tasks.details: Updated SKILL.md instead (more relevant for this skill-based project)
